title: AI Humanizer Free — Bypass AI Detection, Fix Grammar & Rewrite Text.
excerpt: Humanize ChatGPT, Claude or Gemini text in one click. Bypasses GPTZero, Turnitin & Originality.ai. Fix grammar, change tone, paraphrase — powered by Groq Llama 3.3. Free.
content_html:
Powered by Groq Llama 3.3 70B · Free · No Signup

Humanize
ChatGPT Text

Make any AI-generated text sound 100% human. Bypass AI detectors, fix grammar, change tone, paraphrase and summarize — all free, powered by Groq Llama 3.3 70B.

Why Use Zlvox AI Humanizer

🔍

Bypass AI Detection Free

Our Bypass mode uses Groq Llama 3.3 to aggressively rewrite AI text with varied sentence structures and natural imperfections. Bypass AI detection free — reduces scores on GPTZero, Turnitin, Originality.ai and Winston AI significantly.

🎓

Humanize ChatGPT Text for Academic Use

A dedicated academic mode helps you humanize ChatGPT text for essays and research papers while preserving original meaning. Reduce AI detection risk for university submissions without changing your arguments.

⚡

4 Humanize Levels

Light, Medium, Heavy and Bypass — each level gives precise control. Light keeps 80% of original structure. Bypass mode aggressively transforms text to defeat all major AI detectors and make AI writing undetectable.

🎭

6 Writing Tones

Casual for social media, Professional for business, Academic for scholarly work, Creative for blogs, Simple for general audiences, Formal for official documents. Humanize AI text in any tone you need.

🔗

Chained Workflow

Tools work together seamlessly. Humanize ChatGPT text first, then fix grammar in one click. Tone Changer and Paraphraser results pipe directly into the AI to human text converter for a fully polished result.

🔒

Private & Secure

All processing is server-side via Groq API. Your text is never stored or logged. API keys rotate automatically across multiple keys for zero downtime. Free, unlimited, no signup required.

About This Tool

How to Humanize ChatGPT Text

To humanize ChatGPT text, paste your AI-generated content into the Humanizer tab, choose your tone and bypass level, then click Humanize. Groq Llama 3.3 rewrites the text to remove robotic patterns, vary sentence lengths, and add natural human imperfections — making it undetectable by GPTZero, Turnitin, and Originality.ai. Free, unlimited, no account needed.

Bypass AI Detection Free — How It Works

Our bypass AI detection free mode uses the most aggressive rewriting strategy — varied sentence lengths, colloquial phrases, strategic imperfections, and restructured arguments. Select "Bypass AI Detectors" in the Level dropdown for maximum effect. Unlike paid tools like Undetectable.ai or StealthWriter, this is completely free with no word limits per session.

AI to Human Text Converter — All Models

This AI to human text converter works on output from any AI model — ChatGPT (GPT-4o), Claude, Google Gemini, Microsoft Copilot, Jasper, and all others. It detects and removes common AI writing signatures regardless of source. Use Grammar Fixer after humanizing for a fully polished, human-sounding result.

Frequently Asked Questions

Paste your ChatGPT text into the Humanizer tab, select "Bypass AI Detectors" from the Level dropdown, choose your tone, then click Humanize. Groq Llama 3.3 rewrites the text with varied sentence structures, natural imperfections and human patterns — significantly reducing detection scores on GPTZero, Turnitin and Originality.ai. This is the most effective free way to humanize ChatGPT text online.

Yes — Zlvox's bypass AI detection free mode is 100% free with no word limits per session, no premium tier and no signup. Our Bypass level uses Groq Llama 3.3 to aggressively rewrite text with colloquial phrases, sentence length variation and human imperfections. However, no tool can guarantee 100% bypass on every detector — results depend on your original text and the specific detector version.

Light — minimal changes, keeps ~80% of original structure. Medium — balanced rewrite, changes sentence structures while keeping meaning. Heavy — fully rewrites with new phrasing and flow. Bypass AI Detectors — most aggressive, uses colloquial language, varied lengths and natural human imperfections to defeat all major AI detectors including GPTZero and Turnitin.

Yes! This AI to human text converter works with output from any AI model — ChatGPT (GPT-4o, GPT-4), Claude, Google Gemini, Microsoft Copilot, Jasper, Copy.ai and all others. It detects and removes common AI writing patterns regardless of which model originally wrote the content.

The AI Humanizer supports up to 5,000 characters per request (roughly 700–900 words). For longer documents, split your text into sections. There is no daily limit — run as many requests as you need, completely free with no signup.

No. Your text is never stored, logged or shared. Each request is processed in real-time through our server to Groq API and the result is returned directly to you. We maintain no database of your inputs or outputs. Your content is completely private.

Humanize specifically targets AI writing patterns to make text sound human and bypass detectors. Paraphrase rewrites using different words and structures regardless of source. Paraphrase also includes Expand (adds detail), Shorten (removes fluff) and Creative (vivid language) modes that Humanize does not offer.

You can change text from Casual, Professional, Formal, Academic, Aggressive or AI/Robotic tone. Target tones include: Professional, Casual, Formal, Friendly, Persuasive (great for sales), Empathetic (for customer support), Authoritative (for expert content), Humorous and Inspirational.

sentences.en: Our Bypass level uses Groq Llama 3.3 to aggressively rewrite text with colloquial phrases, sentence length variation and human imperfections.
sentences.zh: 我们的绕过级别使用 Groq Llama 3.3 积极地用口语短语、句子长度变化和人类缺陷重写文本。

sentences.en: However, no tool can guarantee 100% bypass on every detector — results depend on your original text and the specific detector version.
sentences.zh: 然而，没有任何工具可以保证每个检测器 100% 绕过 - 结果取决于您的原始文本和特定检测器版本。

blocks.html_en: Light — minimal changes, keeps ~80% of original structure. Medium — balanced rewrite, changes sentence structures while keeping meaning. Heavy — fully rewrites with new phrasing and flow. Bypass AI Detectors — most aggressive, uses colloquial language, varied lengths and natural human imperfections to defeat all major AI detectors including GPTZero and Turnitin.

sentences.en: Light — minimal changes, keeps ~80% of original structure.
sentences.zh: 轻 - 变化最小，保留约 80% 的原始结构。

sentences.en: Medium — balanced rewrite, changes sentence structures while keeping meaning.
sentences.zh: 中——平衡重写，改变句子结构，同时保持含义。

sentences.en: Heavy — fully rewrites with new phrasing and flow.
sentences.zh: 重——用新的措辞和流程完全重写。

sentences.en: Bypass AI Detectors — most aggressive, uses colloquial language, varied lengths and natural human imperfections to defeat all major AI detectors including GPTZero and Turnitin.
sentences.zh: 绕过 AI 探测器 - 最具攻击性，使用口语、不同的长度和自然的人类缺陷来击败所有主要的 AI 探测器，包括 GPTZero 和 Turnitin。

blocks.html_en: Yes! This AI to human text converter works with output from any AI model — ChatGPT (GPT-4o, GPT-4), Claude, Google Gemini, Microsoft Copilot, Jasper, Copy.ai and all others. It detects and removes common AI writing patterns regardless of which model originally wrote the content.

sentences.en: Yes!
sentences.zh: 是的！

sentences.en: This AI to human text converter works with output from any AI model — ChatGPT (GPT-4o, GPT-4), Claude, Google Gemini, Microsoft Copilot, Jasper, Copy.ai and all others.
sentences.zh: 此 AI 到人类文本转换器适用于任何 AI 模型的输出 - ChatGPT（GPT-4o、GPT-4）、Claude、Google Gemini、Microsoft Copilot、Jasper、Copy.ai 等。

sentences.en: It detects and removes common AI writing patterns regardless of which model originally wrote the content.
sentences.zh: 它会检测并删除常见的人工智能写作模式，无论内容最初是由哪个模型编写的。

blocks.html_en: The AI Humanizer supports up to 5,000 characters per request (roughly 700–900 words). For longer documents, split your text into sections. There is no daily limit — run as many requests as you need, completely free with no signup.

sentences.en: The AI Humanizer supports up to 5,000 characters per request (roughly 700–900 words).
sentences.zh: AI Humanizer 支持每个请求最多 5,000 个字符（大约 700-900 个单词）。

sentences.en: For longer documents, split your text into sections.
sentences.zh: 对于较长的文档，请将文本分成几个部分。

sentences.en: There is no daily limit — run as many requests as you need, completely free with no signup.
sentences.zh: 没有每日限制——根据需要运行任意数量的请求，完全免费，无需注册。

blocks.html_en: No. Your text is never stored, logged or shared. Each request is processed in real-time through our server to Groq API and the result is returned directly to you. We maintain no database of your inputs or outputs. Your content is completely private.

sentences.en: No. Your text is never stored, logged or shared.
sentences.zh: 不会。您的文本永远不会被存储、记录或共享。

sentences.en: Each request is processed in real-time through our server to Groq API and the result is returned directly to you.
sentences.zh: 每个请求都会通过我们的服务器实时处理到 Groq API，并将结果直接返回给您。

sentences.en: We maintain no database of your inputs or outputs.
sentences.zh: 我们不维护您的输入或输出的数据库。

sentences.en: Your content is completely private.
sentences.zh: 您的内容是完全私人的。

blocks.html_en: Humanize specifically targets AI writing patterns to make text sound human and bypass detectors. Paraphrase rewrites using different words and structures regardless of source. Paraphrase also includes Expand (adds detail), Shorten (removes fluff) and Creative (vivid language) modes that Humanize does not offer.

sentences.en: Humanize specifically targets AI writing patterns to make text sound human and bypass detectors.
sentences.zh: Humanize 专门针对人工智能书写模式，使文本听起来更人性化并绕过检测器。

sentences.en: Paraphrase rewrites using different words and structures regardless of source.
sentences.zh: 无论来源如何，释义都会使用不同的单词和结构进行重写。

sentences.en: Paraphrase also includes Expand (adds detail), Shorten (removes fluff) and Creative (vivid language) modes that Humanize does not offer.
sentences.zh: Paraphrase 还包括 Humanize 所不提供的展开（添加细节）、缩短（去除多余内容）和创意（生动的语言）模式。

blocks.html_en: You can change text from Casual, Professional, Formal, Academic, Aggressive or AI/Robotic tone. Target tones include: Professional, Casual, Formal, Friendly, Persuasive (great for sales), Empathetic (for customer support), Authoritative (for expert content), Humorous and Inspirational.

sentences.en: You can change text from Casual, Professional, Formal, Academic, Aggressive or AI/Robotic tone.
sentences.zh: 您可以更改休闲、专业、正式、学术、攻击性或人工智能/机器人语气的文本。

sentences.en: Target tones include: Professional, Casual, Formal, Friendly, Persuasive (great for sales), Empathetic (for customer support), Authoritative (for expert content), Humorous and Inspirational.
sentences.zh: 目标语气包括：专业、休闲、正式、友好、有说服力（非常适合销售）、同理心（适合客户支持）、权威（适合专家内容）、幽默和鼓舞人心。

文字总结

为什么使用 Zlvox AI Humanizer

🔍

免费绕过AI检测

我们的 Bypass 模式使用 Groq Llama 3.3 积极重写具有不同句子结构和自然缺陷的 AI 文本。 免费绕过 AI 检测 — 显着降低 GPTZero、Turnitin、Originality.ai 和 Winston AI 的分数。

🎓

人性化 ChatGPT 文本以供学术用途

专用的学术模式可帮助您使论文和研究论文的 ChatGPT 文本人性化，同时保留原始含义。 在不改变论点的情况下降低大学提交的人工智能检测风险。

⚡

4 个人性化级别

轻、中、重和旁路——每个级别都提供精确的控制。 光保留了80%的原始结构。 旁路模式会积极地转换文本，以击败所有主要的人工智能检测器，并使人工智能书写无法检测到。

🎭

6 种书写音

休闲用于社交媒体，专业用于商业，学术用于学术工作，创意用于博客，简单用于一般受众，正式用于官方文件。 以您需要的任何语气使 AI 文本人性化。

🔗

链式工作流程

工具可以无缝地协同工作。 首先将 ChatGPT 文本人性化，然后一键修复语法。 Tone Changer 和 Paraphraser 结果直接传输到 AI 到人类文本转换器中，以获得完全完美的结果。

🔒

私密且安全

所有处理均通过 Groq API 在服务器端进行。 您的文本永远不会被存储或记录。 API 密钥在多个密钥之间自动轮换，以实现零停机时间。 免费、无限制、无需注册。

关于此工具

如何人性化 ChatGPT 文本

要使 ChatGPT 文本人性化，请将 AI 生成的内容粘贴到 Humanizer 选项卡中，选择语气和绕过级别，然后单击人性化。 Groq Llama 3.3 重写了文本，删除机器人模式，改变句子长度，并添加自然的人类缺陷 - 使其无法被 GPTZero、Turnitin 和 Originality.ai 检测到。 免费、无限制、无需帐户。

免费绕过人工智能检测——它是如何工作的

我们的绕过人工智能检测的免费模式使用最积极的重写策略——不同的句子长度、口语短语、策略缺陷和重组的论点。 在级别下拉列表中选择“绕过 AI 探测器”以获得最大效果。 与 UnDetectable.ai 或 StealthWriter 等付费工具不同，它完全免费，每个会话没有字数限制。

AI 到人类文本转换器 - 所有型号

此 AI 到人类文本转换器适用于任何 AI 模型的输出 - ChatGPT (GPT-4o)、Claude、Google Gemini、Microsoft Copilot、Jasper 以及所有其他模型。 它可以检测并删除常见的人工智能书写签名，无论其来源如何。 人性化后使用 Grammar Fixer，以获得完全完美、听起来更人性化的结果。

常见问题解答

将您的 ChatGPT 文本粘贴到 Humanizer 选项卡中，从级别下拉列表中选择“绕过 AI 探测器”，选择您的语气，然后单击 Humanize。 Groq Llama 3.3 用不同的句子结构、自然缺陷和人类模式重写了文本——显着降低了 GPTZero、Turnitin 和 Originality.ai 的检测分数。 这是在线人性化 ChatGPT 文本的最有效的免费方式。

是的 — Zlvox 的绕过 AI 检测免费模式 100% 免费，每个会话没有字数限制，没有高级层，也无需注册。 我们的绕过级别使用 Groq Llama 3.3 积极地用口语短语、句子长度变化和人类缺陷重写文本。 然而，没有任何工具可以保证每个检测器 100% 绕过 - 结果取决于您的原始文本和特定检测器版本。

轻 - 变化最小，保留约 80% 的原始结构。 中——平衡重写，改变句子结构，同时保持含义。 重——用新的措辞和流程完全重写。 绕过 AI 探测器 - 最具攻击性，使用口语、不同的长度和自然的人类缺陷来击败所有主要的 AI 探测器，包括 GPTZero 和 Turnitin。

是的！ 此 AI 到人类文本转换器适用于任何 AI 模型的输出 - ChatGPT（GPT-4o、GPT-4）、Claude、Google Gemini、Microsoft Copilot、Jasper、Copy.ai 等。 它会检测并删除常见的人工智能写作模式，无论内容最初是由哪个模型编写的。

AI Humanizer 支持每个请求最多 5,000 个字符（大约 700-900 个单词）。 对于较长的文档，请将文本分成几个部分。 没有每日限制——根据需要运行任意数量的请求，完全免费，无需注册。

不会。您的文本永远不会被存储、记录或共享。 每个请求都会通过我们的服务器实时处理到 Groq API，并将结果直接返回给您。 我们不维护您的输入或输出的数据库。 您的内容是完全私人的。

Humanize 专门针对人工智能书写模式，使文本听起来更人性化并绕过检测器。 无论来源如何，释义都会使用不同的单词和结构进行重写。 Paraphrase 还包括 Humanize 所不提供的展开（添加细节）、缩短（去除多余内容）和创意（生动的语言）模式。

您可以更改休闲、专业、正式、学术、攻击性或人工智能/机器人语气的文本。 目标语气包括：专业、休闲、正式、友好、有说服力（非常适合销售）、同理心（适合客户支持）、权威（适合专家内容）、幽默和鼓舞人心。
